tagline: A farm to grow with up to 6 friends
donate: ☕ Support the game with a donation
auth.name: Farmer name
farms.empty: You have no farms yet. Create one or join with a code!
farms.hint: Share your farm code so up to 5 friends can play with you.
shop.title: 🏪 Bob's Seed Shop
shop.chickenDesc: lays 1 egg per day (egg sells for 50)
shop.coopDesc: houses your chickens and their eggs
build.place: Click to place · ESC to cancel
craft.title: 🔨 Crafting Bench
craft.fenceDesc: fence — select it in the hotbar and click on grass to place it
bin.title: 📦 Shipping Bin
bin.hint: Put items here — payment arrives when everyone sleeps.
sleep.title: 💤 Sleeping...
day.passedOut: You passed out and woke up with low energy...
err.no_energy: Out of energy! Go to sleep.
err.can_empty: Watering can is empty — refill at the pond!
err.wrong_season: That seed doesn't grow this season.
err.wrong_tool: Wrong tool — use the axe on trees and the pickaxe on rocks.
err.no_animal_space: No room in the coop (max 6 chickens per coop).
err.need_egg_money: You need 100 coins to buy a chicken.
err.need_coop: Build a coop first (Build tab in the shop).
err.bad_spot: Can't build here — pick a flat, clear spot.
err.need_bench: Get closer to the crafting bench (near the house).
err.farm_not_found: Farm not found. Check the code.
